Interface AuthorDao

All Known Implementing Classes:
AuthorDaoImpl
public interface AuthorDao
Data Access Object interface for the Author entity.

All implementations must use PreparedStatement exclusively — never string concatenation — to prevent SQL injection.

All write operations (delete(int)) may throw a RuntimeException wrapping a foreign-key violation when the record is still referenced by books.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    delete(int id)
    Deletes the author with the given id.
    List<Author>
    findAll()
    Returns all authors ordered by full_name ascending.
    List<String>
    findAllCountries()
    Returns distinct country values present in the database, sorted alphabetically.
    Optional<Author>

    Finds a single author by its primary key.

    Inserts a new author record.
    List<Author>

    void

    Updates an existing author record identified by author.getId().

  • Method Details

    • findAll

      List<Author> findAll()
      Returns all authors ordered by full_name ascending.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable snapshot; never null

    • findById

      Optional<Author> findById(int id)
      Finds a single author by its primary key.
      Parameters:
      id - the author ID to look up
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the author, or empty if not found

    • search

      List<Author> search(String text, String country, Integer yearFrom, Integer yearTo)
      Dynamic multi-field search with optional filters.
      • text — case-insensitive LIKE match against full_name, country, and birth_year; ignored if blank
      • country — exact match against country; ignored if blank
      • yearFrom — birth_year >= yearFrom; ignored if null
      • yearTo — birth_year <= yearTo; ignored if null
      Parameters:
      text - free-text search term; may be blank
      country - exact country filter; may be blank
      yearFrom - lower bound for birth year; may be null
      yearTo - upper bound for birth year; may be null
      Returns:
      matching authors ordered by full_name; never null

    • findAllCountries

      List<String> findAllCountries()
      Returns distinct country values present in the database, sorted alphabetically. Used to populate the country filter ComboBox.
      Returns:
      list of country strings; never null

    • insert

      void insert(Author author)
      Inserts a new author record. The id field of author is ignored; the generated key is assigned by the database.
      Parameters:
      author - the author to insert (fullName must be set)

    • update

      void update(Author author)
      Updates an existing author record identified by author.getId().
      Parameters:
      author - the author with updated fields; id must be valid

    • delete

      void delete(int id)
      Deletes the author with the given id.
      Parameters:
      id - the primary key of the author to delete
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the author is referenced by one or more books (foreign-key violation, SQL state 23503)
